text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Good. That's a nice time. My accuracy has
improved a great deal too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I think it's about time for a break. Whether it's
talking or running, we have to make sure we have
enough energy for it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? This is the cafeteria, isn't it? Why does it look so different?
choice_data_list: Maybe they've decorated for the holidays.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Haha! That's right. I didn't even realize it was that
time of year already!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It looks like they're serving roast chicken and
seasonal cake. Ooh! Look, they have pizza over
there too!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I don't see any curry, but I suppose that makes
sense, hehe.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Um, I know it's not exactly a traditional dish for
this time of year...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But at my house, we always used to make what
everyone liked for our holiday dinner.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'd ask my mom to make a fruitcake for me, and
Brian would ask me to make curry for her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Of course, she'd always ask at the last minute, but
the thing is, it takes hours to stew the vegetables
for her favorite kind of curry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I remember correctly, the Arima Kinen falls on a
rather special holiday this year.
choice_data_list:
What kind of present are you going to give
Brian?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Well, let's see... I suppose I'll give her the
best race ever.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I want to face her in the Twinkle Series and run
against her in perfect form.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And I'll prevail with my winning equation.
choice_data_list: You can't let her win, huh?
You can't let her win, huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Of course not. I have my pride to preserve as her
older sister.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: By the way... what are your favorite foods?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's make the most of today and eat our
favorites!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide and I have a wonderfully cheerful
meal together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There's so much snow all around. It really makes
for the perfect festive atmosphere.
choice_data_list: You're even dressed kind of like Santa.
You're even dressed kind of like Santa.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haha, you're right. I fit right in, don't I?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer, tell Santa what you wish for
this year. I might just bring it to you!
choice_data_list: I wish for you to win!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Very well. You'll get your wish soon enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She smiles confidently at me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide and I have a wonderfully cheerful
meal together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: So... Why did you bring me here again?
choice_data_list: I thought maybe you'd like a fruitcake.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You should think about yourself once in a while
too. You're far too indulgent with me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's get two cakes and take them home. One for
me, and one for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide and I each get a cake and enjoy
them together.
